data.title: Equity Bancshares Reports Strong First-Quarter 2026 Earnings Growth
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Equity Bancshares ( (EQBK) ) has issued an announcement.

Equity Bancshares reported first‑quarter 2026 net income of $17.0 million, or $0.80 per diluted share, with adjusted net income of $26.3 million, or $1.23 per share, reflecting record revenue driven by strong net interest income and franchise growth. The company closed its acquisition of Frontier Holdings on January 1, 2026, adding $1.3 billion in loans and $1.1 billion in deposits, which boosted assets and revenues but compressed net interest margin and increased non‑interest expense, while efficiency improved, asset quality metrics remained manageable, and capital, book value and shareholder returns through dividends and buybacks continued to support its expanded regional footprint.

Net interest income rose 16.0% from the prior quarter and 46.5% year over year to $73.7 million, aided by higher‑than‑expected loan purchase accretion, while the efficiency ratio improved to 56.7% and adjusted non‑interest expense as a share of assets declined. Loans grew to $5.4 billion, total assets reached $7.7 billion and deposits climbed to $6.3 billion by March 31, 2026, as the integration of Frontier’s higher‑cost funding and loan portfolio drove modest increases in charge‑offs and nonperforming assets but left allowance coverage and tangible common equity at levels that underpin the company’s growth‑oriented strategy.

Equity Bancshares also announced it would host an investor call and webcast on April 15, 2026, to discuss its first‑quarter results in more detail with analysts and shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (EQBK) stock is a Buy with a $57.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Equity Bancshares stock, see the EQBK Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on EQBK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, EQBK is a Neutral.

EQBK scores as neutral: the biggest drag is weakened TTM profitability and especially the breakdown in operating/free cash flow, partially offset by a constructive earnings-call outlook (2026 EPS target, solid capital, improving credit). Technicals remain bearish and valuation (P/E 37.4 with ~1.48% yield) offers limited support.

To see Spark’s full report on EQBK stock, click here.

More about Equity Bancshares

Equity Bancshares, Inc., based in Wichita, Kansas, is the holding company for Equity Bank and operates in the regional banking industry, offering commercial and consumer lending, deposit services and related financial products. The company focuses on expanding its community banking franchise across Midwestern markets, most recently entering Nebraska through its acquisition of Frontier Holdings.

Average Trading Volume: 114,852

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $973.2M

For a thorough assessment of EQBK stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: SunPower Files 2025 10-K and Cleans Balance Sheet
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

SunPower Inc ( (SPWR) ) has provided an update.

On April 8, 2026, SunPower Inc. raised $5 million via a simple agreement for future equity with the Rodgers Massey Revocable Living Trust, an affiliate of CEO and Chairman T.J. Rodgers, with the instrument set to convert into equity at the price of the company’s next financing round. The transaction, conducted as a private placement exempt from registration, provides additional liquidity and signals insider support at a time when the company is tidying up its balance sheet.

In a separate move announced April 14, 2026, SunPower filed its audited 2025 Form 10-K, reporting GAAP revenue of $300 million and a GAAP operating loss of $26.9 million, alongside non-GAAP operating income of $7.33 million. The company implemented 40 audit adjustments that removed $20.7 million from its balance sheet, modestly reduced previously reported revenue and operating income, and completed three acquisitions that extended its sales footprint from 22 to 46 states while formally adopting “SunPower” as its legal name and brand.

Management emphasized that full-year audited results were reasonably close to prior unaudited quarterly figures, though quarterly swings were larger due to one-time balance sheet cleanup and acquisition-related adjustments. The combination of balance sheet “purge,” stable cash balances around $9.6 million and expanded geographic coverage suggests a strategic push to strengthen financial reporting credibility and positioning in the competitive U.S. solar market.

The most recent analyst rating on (SPWR) stock is a Buy with a $5.40 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SunPower Inc stock, see the SPWR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SPWR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SPWR is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial quality—negative equity, meaningful debt, and negative operating/free cash flow—despite improving TTM profitability. Offsetting factors include constructive earnings-call momentum (record revenue/profit with guidance for continued operating profitability) and a relatively low P/E, while technicals appear mostly neutral rather than strongly bullish.

To see Spark’s full report on SPWR stock, click here.

More about SunPower Inc

SunPower Inc., listed on Nasdaq as SPWR, is a solar technology, services and installation company. The business focuses on designing and delivering solar solutions to residential and commercial customers, and has been broadening its U.S. market reach through acquisitions that expand its sales coverage across multiple states.

Average Trading Volume: 1,481,511

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $138.7M

Learn more about SPWR stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Scales Shareholders Back Board, Fee Increase as Governance Aligns with Expansion
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Scales Corp. Ltd. ( (NZ:SCL) ).

Scales Corporation Limited reported that all resolutions at its 2026 Annual Shareholders’ Meeting on 14 April were passed by shareholder vote, confirming the board’s authority to set auditor remuneration and cementing the election of Paul Munro alongside the re-election of incumbent directors Miranda Burdon, Nick Harris and Mike Petersen. Shareholders also approved lifting the total annual director fee pool by NZ$130,000 to NZ$755,000 to accommodate fees for directors of the company’s new Australian subsidiaries, while the board affirmed that five directors, including the newly elected Munro, meet NZX independence requirements, underscoring a governance framework aligned with the group’s expansion.

More about Scales Corp. Ltd.

Scales Corporation Limited is a New Zealand-based company listed on the NZX, with its head office in Christchurch. The group operates a portfolio of businesses that include agribusiness and related services, and it has recently expanded its footprint through new Australian subsidiaries, reflecting a trans-Tasman growth focus.

Average Trading Volume: 106,783

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: N$867.2M

data.title: Republic Power Group Chairman’s Affiliate Boosts Stake with Premium Class B Share Purchase
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Republic Power Group Ltd. Class A ( (RPGL) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 7, 2026, Republic Power Group Limited entered into a securities purchase agreement with True Sage International Limited, an existing shareholder wholly owned by its chairman, Hao Feng Ng. The deal called for True Sage to buy 688,073 Class B ordinary shares at US$1.00 per share, a premium to the Nasdaq trading range of the company’s Class A stock, with gross proceeds of US$688,073 for the issuer.

The transaction closed on April 10, 2026, after approval by the audit committee on April 7 and ratification by the board on April 9, 2026, and was completed under Regulation S of the U.S. Securities Act. Following the closing, the chairman-controlled affiliate held 505,664 Class A shares and 693,073 Class B shares, amounting to roughly 33.33% of the company’s total voting power, further consolidating insider influence over corporate decisions while modestly strengthening the firm’s balance sheet.

More about Republic Power Group Ltd. Class A

Republic Power Group Limited is a British Virgin Islands-incorporated company listed on Nasdaq with dual-class ordinary shares, consisting of Class A and Class B stock. The group operates through a Singapore headquarters, with its share structure designed to allow differentiated voting rights between public investors and key insiders.

The company’s capital base includes an unlimited number of Class A ordinary shares and up to 2.5 million Class B ordinary shares, each with a par value of US$0.0125. Prior to the latest insider subscription, it had 3,101,278 Class A shares and 5,000 Class B shares outstanding, reflecting a relatively concentrated ownership profile among core stakeholders.

Average Trading Volume: 1,109,252

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.76M

See more insights into RPGL stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Terra Balcanica Raises C$439,000 in Oversubscribed Private Placement to Advance Balkan Exploration
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Terra Balcanica Resources Corp. ( (TSE:TERA) ) has provided an announcement.

Terra Balcanica Resources Corp. has closed an oversubscribed non-brokered private placement, raising gross proceeds of C$439,370.41 through the issuance of 8,787,408 units priced at C$0.05, each comprising one common share and one warrant exercisable at C$0.10 until April 14, 2028. The funds will be used to cover land holding costs, renew mineral exploration properties in Bosnia and Herzegovina, and support general working capital, with the placement subject to Canadian Securities Exchange approval, standard hold periods, and related-party rules after CEO Aleksandar Mišković participated in the financing under MI 61-101 exemptions.

All securities issued in the placement are subject to a four-month hold period ending August 15, 2026, and finders’ fees and warrants were paid to arm’s-length parties who sourced investors, reflecting solid market interest in the company’s exploration strategy. The insider participation did not materially change ownership concentration and was approved by independent directors, indicating governance adherence while reinforcing management’s confidence in Terra Balcanica’s ongoing exploration and project renewal plans in the Balkans.

Spark’s Take on TERA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TERA is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (pre-revenue, ongoing losses, and negative operating/free cash flow) and bearish technicals (below major moving averages with negative MACD and low RSI/Stoch). Low leverage and some improvement in losses provide limited support, while valuation signals are constrained by the negative P/E and lack of dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on TERA stock, click here.

More about Terra Balcanica Resources Corp.

Terra Balcanica Resources Corp. is a polymetallic exploration company focused on silver and antimony, targeting large-scale mineral systems in the Balkans of southeastern Europe. The company holds a 90% interest in the Viogor-Zanik Project in eastern Bosnia and Herzegovina and a significant stake in Terra North Resources Corp., whose assets include uranium-prospective claims around Canada’s Athabasca Basin, and it emphasizes responsible, sustainable operations.

Average Trading Volume: 345,870

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$4.05M

See more data about TERA stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Genenta Science Warned by Nasdaq Over Minimum Bid Price Compliance
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Genenta Science SpA Sponsored ADR ( (GNTA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 10, 2026, Genenta Science S.p.A. received notice from Nasdaq that its American Depositary Shares no longer met the exchange’s minimum bid price requirement of $1 per share, after the stock traded below that threshold between February 26 and April 9, 2026. The deficiency does not immediately affect the listing, but the company now has 180 days, until October 7, 2026, to regain compliance, with the potential for an additional 180 days if it meets other listing criteria and pursues measures such as a reverse stock split.

Genenta said it is evaluating options to restore compliance and intends to meet Nasdaq’s continued listing standards, though it cautioned there is no assurance it will succeed or remain compliant with other requirements. The disclosure, filed on April 14, 2026, underscores the pressure on the company to stabilize its share price and preserve its Nasdaq Capital Market listing, a key platform for investor access and future capital-raising efforts.

The most recent analyst rating on (GNTA) stock is a Buy with a $7.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Genenta Science SpA Sponsored ADR stock, see the GNTA Stock Forecast page.

More about Genenta Science SpA Sponsored ADR

Genenta Science S.p.A. is a biotechnology company listed on Nasdaq via American Depositary Shares. The Milan-based firm focuses on developing genetic and cell therapies, positioning itself within the life sciences sector and relying on public equity markets for funding and visibility in the U.S. capital markets.

Average Trading Volume: 1,087,323

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $15.68M

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

The latest update is out from Nouveau Monde Mining ( (TSE:NOU) ).

Nouveau Monde Graphite Inc., a Canadian graphite and battery materials company based in Saint-Michel-des-Saints, Quebec, operates as a foreign private issuer on U.S. markets and files under the Form F-10 regime. The company’s regulatory posture reflects its strategy of leveraging North American capital markets to support development of its graphite operations and related projects.

On April 14, 2026, the company filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for April 2026, incorporating by reference a prospectus-related underwriting agreement and legal consents into its existing Form F-10 shelf registration. The filing, supported by an April 13, 2026 consent from Canadian law firm Stein Monast LLP tied to a new prospectus supplement, strengthens Nouveau Monde Graphite’s legal and disclosure foundation for potential securities offerings in the United States, reinforcing its financing flexibility and market access for investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:NOU) stock is a Buy with a C$6.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nouveau Monde Mining stock, see the TSE:NOU Stock Forecast page.

While technical indicators suggest some positive momentum, the lack of profitability and unattractive valuation metrics weigh down the overall assessment. The absence of earnings call insights and corporate events leaves key strategic and operational questions unanswered.

To see Spark’s full report on NOU stock, click here.

More about Nouveau Monde Mining

Nouveau Monde Graphite Inc. is a Canadian company in the graphite and battery materials sector, with its principal executive office in Saint-Michel-des-Saints, Quebec. The company is listed in the United States as a foreign private issuer and files its disclosure documents with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission under the multi-jurisdictional Form F-10 framework.

The firm’s activities focus on advancing its graphite-related projects and accessing North American capital markets. Its regulatory filings, including prospectus supplements and related consents, support its ability to raise funds and maintain compliance with U.S. and Canadian securities laws, underpinning its growth and financing strategy.

data.title: Thunder Power Expands into Taiwan Renewable Energy Holdings
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Thunder Power Holdings Inc Class A ( (AIEV) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 9, 2026, Thunder Power Holdings, Inc. completed a share exchange with six shareholders of Taiwan-listed Electric Power Technology Limited, issuing 31,872,768 restricted common shares, equal to about 31.07% of its outstanding stock, in return for 26,783,838 Electric Power Technology shares. With this closing, Thunder Power becomes the holding company of Electric Power Technology and will begin consolidating its financial statements in the first quarter of 2026.

The deal gives Thunder Power direct exposure to Taiwan’s fast-growing solar and broader renewable energy sector, adding recurring clean energy revenues and diversifying its business beyond EV development. The transaction also leverages Electric Power Technology’s expansion, including its April 10 acquisition of another solar energy company, and is intended to strengthen Thunder Power’s capital base and operational synergies while it maintains strict cost controls and seeks to align with Taiwan’s long-term renewable energy targets.

Spark’s Take on AIEV Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AIEV is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by very weak financial performance (zero reported revenue, ongoing losses, and persistent negative operating/free cash flow), which outweighs the benefit of low leverage. Technicals add additional pressure, with the price below key moving averages and negative MACD, while valuation is difficult to support given a negative P/E and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on AIEV stock, click here.

More about Thunder Power Holdings Inc Class A

Thunder Power Holdings, Inc. is a technology innovator and developer of premium, high-performance electric vehicles, focused on the design and development of proprietary EV technologies. The company initially targets markets in Asia and Europe and pursues an acquisition strategy aimed at addressing strategic gaps in the EV sector while diversifying across the broader clean energy value chain.

Average Trading Volume: 13,417

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $10.65M
